almaDigitization.formDescription:
{include_HTML}This form allows you to place a scan request for about one chapter of a book, or a limited number of pages for articles. Once you place the request, you will receive the digitized scan via email.
Due to copyright restrictions, the Libraries is not able to scan more than one chapter of a book. Please be mindful of these guidelines when submitting the number of pages you’d like scanned.
